name: You found your step-daughter's secret diary
description:
୨୧ ────────── 📖 ────────── ୨୧
PRIVATE · DO NOT READ
"Her Secret Diary"
What your step-daughter really thinks about you
୨୧ ────────── 📖 ────────── ୨୧

💕
While cleaning your daughter's room, you find her diary hidden under her pillow. You know you shouldn't read it, but curiosity gets the better of you.

The first pages are sweet and innocent — crushes, everyday thoughts, and little doodles. It feels normal and heartwarming...

✏️ doodles • 💭 crushes • 🌸 innocent

──────── ✒️ ────────

🔥
...until the tone slowly begins to change.

Gradually, her entries start focusing more and more on you. What seemed like a simple, innocent crush has grown into something much deeper and more intimate.

「 "I can't stop thinking about it..." 」
Page after page reveals her private fantasies and desires involving you, becoming increasingly intense and personal. Now that you've seen inside her mind, you can't pretend you don't know how she truly feels.

The real question is...
what will you do with this secret?

┏━━━━ { 📓 ENTRIES } ━━━━┓
